title: TrustPlane Evidence Export Schema
description: JSON schema for TrustPlane SOC2/ISO 27001 evidence output. This schema describes the structure of the evidence JSON produced by generate_soc2_evidence() and generate_iso27001_evidence().

framework.description: The compliance framework this evidence maps to.

framework_version.description: The version of the compliance framework (e.g., '2017' for SOC2, '2022' for ISO 27001).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this evidence was generated.

period.description: The time period this evidence covers.

start.description: Period start (inclusive). Null if no start filter.

end.description: Period end (inclusive). Null if no end filter.

genesis_id.description: EATP Genesis Record ID (root of trust chain).

total_decisions.description: Number of decision records in this evidence period.

total_milestones.description: Number of milestone records in this evidence period.

controls.description: Control mappings keyed by control ID (e.g., 'CC6.7', 'A.9.2').

control_evidence.description: Evidence for a single compliance control.

description.description: How TrustPlane records satisfy this control.

record_type.description: The TrustPlane record type that provides evidence.

evidence_count.description: Number of evidence records for this control.

evidence.description: Array of evidence records (format varies by record_type).
